response.overview: Three film students set out on a journey to Yereymentau, a small and often overlooked town located 150 kilometers from Kazakhstan’s capital. Surrounded by scenic landscapes and known for its peaceful atmosphere, the town reveals its character through the stories of its residents, its natural beauty, and the quiet rhythm of everyday life. Divided into four interactive chapters, I Know a Spot invites viewers to explore Ereymentau and discover the hidden charm of a place rarely seen by the outside world.
response.tagline: Maybe you know a spot too?
response.title: I Know a Spot
